We introduce MOCHA (Multi-Objective Chebyshev Annealing), which replaces single-objective selection with Chebyshev scalarization - covering the full Pareto front, including non-convex regions - combined with exponential annealing that transitions from exploration to exploitation. In our experiments across six diverse agent skills - where all methods share the same multi-objective mutation operator and baselines receive identical per-objective textual feedback - existing optimizers fail to improve the seed skill on 4 of 6 tasks: 1000 rollouts yield zero progress. MOCHA breaks through on every task, achieving 7.5% relative improvement in mean correctness over the strongest baseline (up to 14.9% on FEVER and 10.4% on TheoremQA) while discovering twice as many more Pareto-optimal skill variants.

</details>


### [219] [Can Large Language Models Revolutionize Survey Research? Experiments with Disaster Preparedness Responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19229)
*Yan Wang,Ziyi Guo,Christopher McCarty*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出并评估了一个五阶段的LLM集成框架（问卷设计、样本选择、试点测试、缺失数据填补、事后分析），以2024年飓风米尔顿佛罗里达居民 preparedness 调查（n=946）为测试平台。提出的锚定边际理论信息LLM（A-TLM）在灾害相关的块状MNAR条件下，RMSE优于三类经典填补基线（1.439 vs 1.496），且近零有符号偏差（-0.121），而随机森林填补产生最大绝对偏差（-0.631）。基于PMT因果结构组织检索并在单次模型调用中整合所有证据，优于非结构化检索和分阶段顺序推理（MAE 0.993 vs 1.097）。研究还提出子组分层的偏差审计作为报告标准，并通过检索约束的知识图谱聊天机器人证明幻觉在架构上可通过grounded refusal进行管理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 调查研究面临响应率下降、样本偏差、高风险受访者的块状缺失以及AI辅助欺诈完成等结构性挑战。LLM被提出作为解决方案，但在完整调查流程中的严格评估仍然匮乏，尤其是在数据质量至关重要的灾害情境下。

Method: 提出包含问卷设计、样本选择、试点测试、缺失数据填补和事后分析的五阶段LLM集成框架。引入PMT约束的共现知识图谱，开发七种LLM配置（零样本推理、检索增强基线、理论信息变体）。提出锚定边际理论信息LLM（A-TLM），基于PMT因果结构组织检索，在单次模型调用中整合所有证据。

Result: A-TLM在灾害相关块状MNAR条件下RMSE优于IPW/MI、MICE+PMM、missForest三类基线（S4 RMSE 1.439 vs 1.496）；近零有符号偏差（-0.121），远优于随机森林（-0.631）；基于PMT因果结构组织检索优于标准RAG（MAE 0.993 vs 1.097）；近零聚合偏差可能掩盖相反的子群体误差。

Conclusion: LLM集成可显著改善灾害调查中的缺失数据填补质量；理论约束的检索架构优于无结构检索；应引入子组分层的偏差审计作为报告标准；通过grounded refusal可实现架构层面的幻觉管理。

Abstract: Survey research faces mounting structural challenges: declining response rates, sample bias, block-wise missingness among at-risk respondents, and AI-assisted fraudulent completions in online panels. Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as a remedy, yet rigorous evaluations across the full survey workflow remain scarce, particularly in disaster contexts where data quality matters most. We present and evaluate a five-stage framework for LLM integration covering questionnaire design, sample selection, pilot testing, missing-data imputation, and post-collection analysis, using the 2024 Hurricane Milton preparedness survey of Florida residents (n=946) as a shared empirical testbed. We introduce a Protection Motivation Theory (PMT)-constrained co-occurrence knowledge graph and develop seven LLM configurations spanning zero-shot inference, retrieval-augmented baselines, and novel theory-informed variants. Our proposed Anchored Marginal Theory-Informed LLM (A-TLM) outperforms all three classical imputation baselines (IPW/MI, MICE+PMM, missForest) on RMSE under disaster-relevant block-wise MNAR conditions (S4 RMSE 1.439 vs. 1.496 for the next-best), while achieving near-zero signed bias (-0.121) where the random-forest imputer produces the largest absolute bias (-0.631). Organizing retrieval around PMT causal structure and integrating all evidence in a single model call outperforms unstructured retrieval and staged sequential inference (MAE 0.993 vs. 1.097 for standard RAG). We document that near-zero aggregate bias can mask opposing subgroup errors and propose subgroup-stratified bias auditing as a reporting standard. A retrieval-constrained knowledge-graph chatbot demonstrates that hallucination is architecturally manageable through grounded refusal.

</details>


### [220] [Library Drift: Diagnosing and Fixing a Silent Failure Mode in Self-Evolving LLM Skill Libraries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19576)
*Xing Zhang,Yanwei Cui,Guanghui Wang,Ziyuan Li,Wei Qiu,Bing Zhu,Peiyang He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文揭示了自进化技能库中的"库漂移"问题（无结果驱动的技能无限制累积导致性能停滞），提供了可复现的触发机制、痕迹级诊断方法和验证过的治理方案（结果驱动的淘汰+有限活跃容量+元技能先验），使MBPP+ hard-100上的pass@1从0.258提升至0.584。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自进化技能库存在一个"库漂移"的隐性失败模式：技能无限制累积但缺乏结果驱动的生命周期管理，导致检索退化、假阳性注入和性能停滞。尽管已有观察表明LLM自创技能几乎无收益（+0.0pp），而人工策划的技能有显著提升（+16.2pp），但背后的机制尚未被分离和分析。

Method: (1) 通过消融实验隔离漂移：禁用技能注入（平坦基线+0.002）和强制提前淘汰（主动伤害-0.019）；(2) 设计痕迹级诊断工具：附加式证据日志，包含每个技能的贡献分数、归因判定和路由器参与度指标；(3) 提出最小治理方案：结果驱动的淘汰机制 + 有限活跃容量 + 元技能创作先验。

Result: 在MBPP+ hard-100上经过100轮实验，治理方案将held-out pass@1从0.258基线提升至后期窗口均值0.584（滚动增益+0.328）。通过8项消融实验分解了各治理机制的负载贡献。

Conclusion: 库漂移是可复现、可诊断且可修复的问题。提供的诊断工具和治理方案可以作为一个具体的行动指南，用于诊断任何自进化智能体中的库漂移问题。

Abstract: Self-evolving skill libraries face a silent failure mode we term \emph{library drift}: unbounded skill accumulation without outcome-driven lifecycle management causes retrieval degradation, false-positive injections, and performance stagnation. Recent evaluation confirms the symptom--LLM-authored skills deliver +0.0pp gain while human-curated ones deliver +16.2pp (SkillsBench)--yet the underlying mechanism has not been isolated. We provide (1) a reproducible trigger: ablations that isolate drift--one disables skill injection (flat floor, +0.002), one imposes premature retirement (active harm, $-$0.019); (2) trace-level diagnostics: an append-only evidence log with per-skill contribution scores, attribution verdicts, and router engagement metrics that make the failure visible before it reaches end-task scores; and (3) a verified fix: a minimal governance recipe (outcome-driven retirement + bounded active-cap + meta-skill authoring prior) that lifts held-out pass@1 from a 0.258 baseline to a late-window mean of 0.584 (rolling gain $+$0.328) on MBPP+ hard-100 over 100 rounds. Eight ablations decompose which governance mechanisms are load-bearing and which are subsumed, providing a concrete playbook for diagnosing library drift in any self-evolving agent.

</details>


### [221] [Causal Evidence for Attention Head Imbalance in Modality Conflict Hallucination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19250)
*Jinrui Jiang,Zhangtai Wu,Zhen Wu,Xinyu Dai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过对多模态大语言模型的注意力头进行因果分析，发现两种对立的注意力头（驱动幻觉和抵抗幻觉），并基于此提出模态冲突感知因果干预方法MACI，通过抑制驱动幻觉的注意力头显著减少幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解多模态大语言模型中模态冲突幻觉产生的内部机制，即视觉证据为何无法在生成过程中战胜错误的文本前提。

Method: 对五种开源MLLM进行路径修补的头级因果分析，识别出两类注意力头（驱动幻觉和抵抗幻觉），提出MACI——在检测到模态冲突时有条件地抑制驱动幻觉头的因果干预方法。

Result: 发现驱动效应分布更广且权重更大，抵抗效应集中在少量高重要性头上。MACI在MMMC基准上实现最大幻觉减少，且在保持良好幻觉-准确率权衡的同时，零样本迁移到SCI-SemanticConflict测试。

Conclusion: 驱动与抵抗效应之间的不对称分布（广泛驱动 vs. 局部抵抗）形成了不平衡的路由结构，偏向生成错误前提；通过有针对性的因果干预可有效缓解模态冲突幻觉。

Abstract: Modality-conflict hallucination occurs when multimodal large language models (MLLMs) prioritize erroneous textual premises over contradictory visual evidence. To understand why visual evidence fails to prevail during generation, we take a mechanistic perspective and examine which internal components drive or resist this failure. We perform head-level causal analysis using path patching across five open-source MLLMs and identify two groups of attention heads with opposing causal roles: hallucination-driving heads and hallucination-resisting heads. We find a consistent asymmetry: driving effects are more broadly distributed and carry greater aggregate weight, whereas resisting effects concentrate in a small number of high-importance heads. Ablation experiments further confirm that these groups exert opposing effects during generation: distributed driving influence and localized resistance together form an imbalanced routing structure that biases generation toward the erroneous premise. Motivated by this finding, we propose MACI (Modality-conflict-Aware Causal Intervention), a conditional intervention that suppresses causally identified hallucination-driving heads only when conflict is detected. Across five MLLMs, MACI achieves the largest hallucination reduction among compared inference-time baselines on the MMMC benchmark with a favorable hallucination-accuracy trade-off, and transfers zero-shot to the SCI-SemanticConflict test.

</details>


### [222] [AQuaUI: Visual Token Reduction for GUI Agents with Adaptive Quadtrees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19260)
*Yuankai Li,Tinghui Zhu,Ha Min Son,Zhe Zhao,Xin Liu,Muhao Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AQuaUI，一种无需训练的推理时令牌缩减方法，利用自适应四叉树结构压缩GUI截图中的空间冗余，在保持99.06%性能的同时实现最高13.22%加速和29.52%视觉令牌减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LMM驱动的GUI智能体模型将高分辨率截图作为输入，但截图存在严重的不均匀信息密度（大面积区域信息量低，关键文本/图标需高保真度）。现有方法要么需要额外训练，要么依赖注意力机制进行令牌压缩，忽略了GUI截图的结构化布局和空间冗余特性。

Method: 1) 对每张GUI截图构建自适应四叉树，每片叶子保留一个代表性合并令牌；2) 在整个流水线中保留令牌的空间位置以保持位置编码一致性；3) 提出条件四叉树算法，利用连续截图间的连续性，以先前的四叉树为参考优化当前四叉树，提升多步交互的时间一致性。

Result: 在GUI-Owl-1.5-32B-Instruct模型上，AQuaUI实现最高13.22%推理加速、29.52%视觉令牌减少，同时保留99.06%的全令牌性能，在标准基准测试上一致优于现有方法。

Conclusion: GUI截图的空间冗余可以在不重新训练的情况下在推理时被有效利用，AQuaUI在精度-效率权衡上取得了显著改进，为GUI智能体的高效部署提供了新思路。

Abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have recently emerged as promising backbones for GUI-agent models, where high-resolution GUI screenshots are introduced to the prompts at each iteration step. However, these screenshots exhibit highly non-uniform spatial information density: large regions may carry little information and are visually homogeneous, while key text and icons may require high visual fidelity. Existing approaches to this problem either require additional training or rely on attention-based token compression, ignoring the structured layout and spatial redundancy of GUI screenshots. To fill the gap, this paper proposes AquaUI, a training-free inference-time token reduction method for GUI agent models that utilizes the non-uniform information density in screenshots. AQuaUI constructs an adaptive quadtree on each screenshot input and keeps one representative merged token per leaf of the quadtree. AQuaUI preserves the spatial positions of retained tokens throughout the pipeline to ensure that all position-encoding stages remain consistent. To further improve temporal consistency across multi-step GUI interactions, we propose a conditional quadtree algorithm that leverages the continuity between consecutive screenshots within a single request. Specifically, it refines the current quadtree using previous quadtrees as references, helping preserve fine-grained regions across static or mildly shifted GUI states. We implement AQuaUI on state-of-the-art GUI agent models and conduct experiments on standard grounding and navigational benchmarks. AQuaUI consistently shows improved accuracy-efficiency trade-offs over prior baselines. Notably, on GUI-Owl-1.5-32B-Instruct, AQuaUI achieves up to 13.22% speedup and 29.52% fewer visual tokens while retaining 99.06% of full-token performance, suggesting that the spatial redundancy of GUI screenshots can be exploited at inference without retraining.

</details>


### [223] [OpenComputer: Verifiable Software Worlds for Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19769)
*Jinbiao Wei,Qianran Ma,Yilun Zhao,Xiao Zhou,Kangqi Ni,Guo Gan,Arman Cohan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OpenComputer 是一个基于验证器的框架，通过应用状态验证器、自进化验证层、任务生成管道和评估工具链，构建可验证的计算机操作软件世界，覆盖33个桌面应用和1000个任务。实验表明硬编码验证器比LLM评判更准确，前沿Agent在端到端完成上仍面临挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算机操作Agent缺乏可靠的自动化验证机制，LLM-as-judge评估在细粒度应用状态判断上不够准确，需要构建可验证、可审计的软件环境来评估Agent的真实能力。

Method: 提出OpenComputer框架，包含四个核心组件：(1) 应用专用状态验证器，暴露结构化检查接口；(2) 自进化验证层，利用执行反馈提升验证器可靠性；(3) 任务生成管道，合成真实且可机器检查的桌面任务；(4) 评估工具链，记录完整轨迹并计算可审计的部分奖励分数。

Result: OpenComputer覆盖33个桌面应用和1000个任务；硬编码验证器与人类评判的一致性优于LLM-as-judge；前沿Agent在端到端完成上表现不佳，开源模型相比OSWorld-Verified分数出现显著下降。

Conclusion: 可靠的验证机制对评估计算机操作Agent至关重要，当前Agent在细粒度桌面自动化方面仍有显著差距，OpenComputer为这一领域提供了更严格的评估基准。

Abstract: We present OpenComputer, a verifier-grounded framework for constructing verifiable software worlds for computer-use agents. OpenComputer integrates four components: (1) app-specific state verifiers that expose structured inspection endpoints over real applications, (2) a self-evolving verification layer that improves verifier reliability using execution-grounded feedback, (3) a task-generation pipeline that synthesizes realistic and machine-checkable desktop tasks, and (4) an evaluation harness that records full trajectories and computes auditable partial-credit rewards. In its current form, OpenComputer covers 33 desktop applications and 1,000 finalized tasks spanning browsers, office tools, creative software, development environments, file managers, and communication applications. Experiments show that OpenComputer's hard-coded verifiers align more closely with human adjudication than LLM-as-judge evaluation, especially when success depends on fine-grained application state. Frontier agents struggle with end-to-end completion despite partial progress, and open-source models exhibit sharp drops from their OSWorld-Verified scores, exposing a persistent gap in robust computer automation.

</details>


### [224] [Swimming with Whales: Analysis of Power Imbalances in Stake-Weighted Governance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19264)
*Yuzhe Zhang,Manvir Schneider,Qin Wang,Davide Grossi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究PoS区块链中按权益加权投票机制导致的权力失衡问题，通过社会选择理论中的Penrose-Banzhaf权力指数量化分析，证明权力与权益占比的完美对齐在一般情况下无法实现，但可在特定条件下近似达到。基于Project Catalyst的真实数据提供了实证分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PoS区块链中按权益加权的投票机制容易导致权力扭曲——少数大额权益持有者可能完全控制决策。本文旨在通过计算社会选择理论视角，量化分析这种权力失衡的程度。

Method: 采用Penrose-Banzhaf权力指数作为量化工具，进行理论推导证明权力与权益占比的对齐条件，并结合Project Catalyst真实链上治理数据进行实证分析。

Result: 理论上证明权力与权益占比的完美对齐一般无法实现，但可在特定条件下近似达到；实证上揭示了当前权益加权治理系统中实际存在的权力失衡程度。

Conclusion: 为PoS区块链治理机制设计提供了理论依据，指出需要关注和缓解权益加权投票中的权力集中问题。

Abstract: Voting methods weighted by stakes are the fundamental governance paradigm in Proof-of-Stake (PoS) blockchains. Such a paradigm is known to be prone to power distortions: a few users possessing large stakes may completely control decision making, even without owning the totality of the stakes. We study this phenomenon through the lens of computational social choice, focusing on the extent of power imbalances in stake-weighted voting when power is quantified using the Penrose-Banzhaf power index. Our work presents both analytical and empirical contributions. Analytically, we demonstrate that while a perfect alignment between power and relative stake ownership is generally unattainable, it can be approximated in expectation under specific conditions. Empirically, using data from a real-world on-chain governance system (Project Catalyst), we provide a more fine-grained understanding of the power imbalances that are likely to occur in current stake-weighted governance systems.

</details>


### [225] [Prior Knowledge or Search? A Study of LLM Agents in Hardware-Aware Code Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19782)
*Dmitry Redko,Albert Fazlyev,Konstantin Sozykin,Maria Ivanova,Evgeny Burnaev,Egor Shvetsov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过三个受控实验发现，LLM在代码优化任务中高度依赖预训练先验知识，而非提供的反馈或智能体结构。具体发现包括：LLM在黑盒优化中充当贪婪优化器；在零样本内核生成中，输入尺寸信息几乎无效；在反馈循环优化中，CUDA表现持续提升，而TVM IR反而退化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代LLM智能体结构日益复杂，难以评估哪些组件贡献最大，以及在何时、以何种方式探索可能失败。作者希望通过受控实验来回答这些问题。

Method: 通过三个受控实验：(1) 纯黑盒优化实验；(2) 零样本内核生成实验（测试输入尺寸信息和温度的影响）；(3) 反馈循环内核优化实验（对比CUDA和TVM IR在不同语言密度下的表现）。

Result: (1) LLM在黑盒优化中表现为贪婪优化器；(2) 提供输入尺寸信息无显著效果，模型对非常见内核尺寸性能急剧下降；(3) CUDA在迭代反馈下单调提升，TVM IR反而退化，表明低密度语言会导致优化退化。

Conclusion: LLM在代码优化任务中的表现高度依赖于预训练先验，而非提供的反馈或智能体结构设计。

Abstract: LLM discovery and optimization systems are increasingly applied across domains, implementing a common propose-evaluate-revise loop. Such optimization or discovery progresses via context conditioning on received feedback from an environment. However, as modern LLM agents are increasingly complex in their structure, it is difficult to evaluate which components contribute the most, and when and how this exploration may fail. We answer these questions through three controlled experiments. Our findings: (1) In pure black-box optimization, LLMs act as greedy optimizers. (2) In zero-shot kernel generation, providing explicit input-size information has no measurable effect, models converge to the same kernel parameters regardless of size or temperature, as though the size instruction were invisible. Moreover, when tasked to perform kernel optimization for uncommon kernel sizes, performance sharply degrades regardless of the language used. (3) In feedback-loop kernel optimization, CUDA improves monotonically under iterative feedback, while TVM IR actively degrades, which demonstrates that kernel optimization degrades when models operate with low-density language. Our results conclude that LLMs in code optimization tasks highly depend on pretrained priors rather than provided feedback or agentic structure.

</details>


### [226] [A Methodology for Selecting and Composing Runtime Architecture Patterns for Production LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20173)
*Vasundra Srinivasan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出**随机-确定性边界（SDB）**作为生产级LLM agent运行时的核心原语，并围绕该边界将agent运行时设计组织为协调、状态、控制三大关注点。作者给出了六种运行时模式（如分层委托、散聚+Saga、事件驱动序列等），以及一套五步方法论用于模式选择、故障诊断，并识别了"回放发散"这一关键失效模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生产级LLM agent将随机模型输出与确定性软件系统混合，但二者之间的边界从未被当作一等架构对象对待。论文旨在命名并形式化这一边界（SDB），将其确立为agent运行时的负载支撑原语，从而为系统化设计和诊断提供基础。

Method: 1) 定义SDB为四部分合约（提议者、验证者、提交步骤、拒绝信号）；2) 围绕SDB将运行时设计组织为协调、状态、控制三个维度；3) 给出六种运行时模式及其分布式系统渊源；4) 提出五步模式选择方法论和故障诊断流程；5) 识别"回放发散"失效模式；6) 通过可靠性分解区分逐调用模型方差与架构动量。

Result: 1) 命名并形式化了随机-确定性边界（SDB）；2) 提供六种运行时模式目录；3) 提出模式选择方法论和诊断程序；4) 识别回放发散失效模式；5) 提出可靠性分解（模型方差 vs 架构动量），论证模型方差下降时模式选择与SDB强度对长期可靠性的重要性上升；6) 在五个工作负载上应用方法论，并提供90天合同续约agent的可运行参考实现。

Conclusion: SDB是生产级agent运行时的核心原语。随着模型方差降低，模式选择和SDB强度将成为长期可靠性的关键杠杆。论文提供的模式目录和方法论可指导实际agent系统的设计、诊断与演进。

Abstract: Production LLM agents combine stochastic model outputs with deterministic software systems, yet the boundary between the two is rarely treated as a first-class architectural object. This paper names that boundary the stochastic-deterministic boundary (SDB): a four-part contract among a proposer, verifier, commit step, and reject signal that specifies how an LLM output becomes a system action. We argue that the SDB is the load-bearing primitive of production agent runtimes.
  Around this primitive, we organize agent runtime design into three concerns: Coordination, State, and Control. We present a catalog of six runtime patterns that compose the SDB differently across conversational, autonomous, and long-horizon agents: hierarchical delegation, scatter-gather plus saga, event-driven sequencing, shared state machine, supervisor plus gate, and human in the loop. For each pattern, we trace its lineage to distributed-systems concepts and identify what changes when the worker is stochastic.
  The paper contributes a five-step methodology for selecting runtime patterns, a diagnostic procedure that maps production failures to pattern weaknesses, and a failure mode called replay divergence, in which LLM-based consumers of a deterministic event log produce different downstream outputs under model-version or prompt changes. A stylized reliability decomposition separates per-call model variance from architectural momentum, motivating the claim that as model variance decreases, pattern choice and SDB strength become increasingly important levers for long-run reliability. We apply the methodology to five workloads and provide one runnable reference implementation for a 90-day contract-renewal agent.

</details>


### [227] [Agentic Trading: When LLM Agents Meet Financial Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19337)
*Yihan Xia,Panpan You,Taotao Wang,Fang Liu,Han Qi,Xiaoxiao Wu,Shengli Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统调查了77篇将LLM作为交易代理的研究，发现仅有19篇满足基本评估边界，且存在严重的协议不可比性：极少报告时间分割协议、交易成本模型、存活偏差处理等关键要素，无研究达到R3可重复性标准。主要贡献是证据账本、可重复性审计和报告清单。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有将LLM嵌入交易系统的研究快速增长，但缺乏系统性的审计和评估标准，导致研究之间难以比较和复现。

Method: 采用协议编码的横截面快照方法，筛选截至2026年3月9日的77篇纳入研究，其中19篇满足"动作输出+闭环评估"最小边界作为主要实证子集，其余作为背景参考。

Result: 主要发现是协议不可比性：19篇中仅2篇报告可提取的时间一致分割协议，1篇报告明确交易成本模型，1篇处理存活偏差，11篇报告执行时序，15篇被评为R0，无研究达到R3可重复性。采用架构-能力-适应作为分析透镜。

Conclusion: 架构实验快速扩展，但可比评估协议、执行语义和可重复制品是该领域当前的瓶颈。

Abstract: A growing body of work explores how Large Language Models (LLMs) can be embedded in trading systems as agents that perceive market information, retrieve context, reason about decisions, emit tradable actions, and adapt under market feedback. This paper reframes LLM-based trading agents as expert-system decision pipelines and presents an audit-oriented evidence map of 77 included studies in a protocol-coded snapshot screened through 2026-03-09. A primary empirical subset (n=19) satisfies the minimum boundary of Action Output plus Closed-Loop Evaluation; the remaining 58 included studies are retained as background and design context. The central empirical finding is protocol incomparability: within the primary subset, only 2/19 studies report extractable time-consistent split protocols, 1/19 reports an explicit transaction-cost model, 1/19 documents universe or survivorship handling, 11/19 report execution timing or semantics, 15/19 are coded as R0, and no study reaches R3 reproducibility. We therefore use Architecture-Capability-Adaptation as a working analytical lens rather than a validated taxonomy, and we foreground the evidence ledger, reproducibility audit, and reporting checklist as the main contributions. The resulting survey shows that architectural experimentation is expanding rapidly, while comparable evaluation protocols, execution semantics, and reproducible artifacts remain the field's immediate bottlenecks.

</details>


### [228] [Generative Recursive Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19376)
*Junyeob Baek,Mingyu Jo,Minsu Kim,Mengye Ren,Yoshua Bengio,Sungjin Ahn*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GRAM通过将递归潜在推理建模为随机潜在轨迹，将确定性递归推理扩展为概率多轨迹计算，支持多假设、替代策略和推理时缩放，在结构化推理和多解约束满足任务上优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的递归推理模型（RRMs）大多是确定性的，遵循单一潜在轨迹并收敛到单一预测，缺乏处理多假设和不确定性推理的能力。

Method: 提出GRAM框架，将递归潜在推理转化为随机潜在轨迹的概率多轨迹计算，支持通过递归深度和并行轨迹采样进行推理时缩放，训练使用摊销变分推断。

Result: 在结构化推理和多解约束满足任务上，GRAM优于确定性递归和循环基线方法，并展示了无条件生成能力。

Conclusion: GRAM成功将递归推理从确定性单轨迹扩展为概率多轨迹范式，为未来神经推理系统实现扩展计算提供了新方向。

Abstract: How should future neural reasoning systems implement extended computation? Recursive Reasoning Models (RRMs) offer a promising alternative to autoregressive sequence extension by performing iterative latent-state refinement with shared transition functions. Yet existing RRMs are largely deterministic, following a single latent trajectory and converging to a single prediction. We introduce \emph{Generative Recursive reAsoning Models (GRAM)}, a framework that turns recursive latent reasoning into probabilistic multi-trajectory computation. GRAM models reasoning as a stochastic latent trajectory, enabling multiple hypotheses, alternative solution strategies, and inference-time scaling through both recursive depth and parallel trajectory sampling. This yields a latent-variable generative model supporting conditional reasoning via $p_θ(y \mid x)$ and, with fixed or absent inputs, unconditional generation via $p_θ(x)$. Trained with amortized variational inference, GRAM improves over deterministic recurrent and recursive baselines on structured reasoning and multi-solution constraint satisfaction tasks, while demonstrating an unconditional generation capability. \href{https://ahn-ml.github.io/gram-website/}{https://ahn-ml.github.io/gram-website}

</details>


### [229] [PRISM: A Benchmark for Programmatic Spatial-Temporal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19382)
*Qiran Zhang,Yuheng Wang,Runde Yang,Lin Wu,Jingru Fan,Shu Yao,Jie Zhang,Tianle Zhou,Huatao Li,Ruijie Shi,Yihan Li,Chen Qian*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PRISM基准（10,372个人类校准的指令-代码对），用于评估语言模型在程序化视频生成中的空间连贯性，发现可执行代码与空间正确性之间存在约41%的巨大差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 程序化视频生成通过代码实现几何精度和时间连贯性，但现有评估缺乏对语言模型能否生成空间正确动画输出的严格评测。

Method: 构建PRISM基准（10,372个指令-代码对，涵盖中英文437个类别），提出漏斗式评估框架包含四个指标：代码级可靠性、空间推理、PADVC和时序密度。

Result: 主流LLM评估显示执行成功率到空间通过率平均下降约41%，揭示了"执行-空间差距"。

Conclusion: 程序化视频生成评估不应仅关注代码可执行性，PRISM为推进空间连贯代码生成提供了原则性基准。

Abstract: Programmatic video generation through code offers geometric precision and temporal coherence beyond pixel-level diffusion models, yet rigorously evaluating whether language models can produce spatially correct animated outputs remains an open problem. We introduce PRISM, a large-scale benchmark of 10,372 human-calibrated instruction-code pairs (20 times larger than prior programmatic video generation benchmarks), grounded in real-world knowledge visualization scenarios across English and Chinese and spanning 437 subject categories. We further propose a funnel-style evaluation framework with four complementary metrics: Code-Level Reliability for executability, Spatial Reasoning for layout correctness over full animation sequences, and Prompt-Aware Dynamic Visual Complexity (PADVC) and Temporal Density (TD) for diagnosing dynamic expression and temporal activity. Systematic evaluation of seven mainstream LLMs reveals a striking Execution-Spatial Gap: the average drop from execution success rate to spatial pass rate is approximately 41%, showing that runnable code does not necessarily yield spatially coherent visual output. These findings show that programmatic video generation evaluation should go beyond executability. PRISM provides a principled benchmark for advancing spatially coherent code generation.

</details>


### [230] [Conflict-Resilient Multi-Agent Reasoning via Signed Graph Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19418)
*Longgang He,Longzhu He,Daojing He,Chaozhuo Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出SIGMA框架，通过符号图建模智能体间的信任、冲突和中性关系，采用冲突感知的消息传递机制，有效解决了多智能体系统中错误传播和缺乏结构感知的问题，在多个基准数据集上取得显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于图的多智能体系统存在两个关键问题：(1) 当出现冲突信号时，缺乏控制导致错误传播；(2) 缺乏对智能体间冲突关系的显式建模以及结构感知能力，无法识别可靠的交互模式。

Method: SIGMA框架包含三个步骤：(1) 根据查询选择相关且多样化的智能体；(2) 构建带置信度权重的符号化交互图；(3) 通过冲突感知的符号消息传递进行推理，强化可信智能体信息并抑制冲突信号，最终进行结构和冲突感知的加权聚合。

Result: 在六个基准数据集、多种LLM主干和多智能体配置下，SIGMA在准确性和冲突韧性方面持续优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: 符号图建模和冲突感知的消息传递机制是提升多智能体系统鲁棒性和性能的有效途径。

Abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) have demonstrated strong reasoning and decision-making capabilities that consistently surpass those of single LLM agents. However, their performance often suffers from naive aggregation mechanisms that assume uniformly cooperative interactions. Upon close inspection, we observe that existing graph-based MAS frameworks (1) propagate errors when conflicting signals arise without control, and (2) lack explicit modeling of conflicting inter-agent relations as well as structural awareness, failing to identify reliable interaction patterns. To bridge this gap, we introduce SIGMA, a novel SIgned Graph-informed Multi-Agent reasoning framework that explicitly captures trust, conflict, and neutral relations among agents via a signed relational graph. Specifically, given a query, SIGMA first selects a set of relevant and diverse agents, then constructs a structured signed interaction graph with confidence-weighted edges. Reasoning proceeds through conflict-aware signed message passing, which reinforces information from trustworthy agents while suppressing conflicting signals, and terminates with a structure- and conflict-aware weighted aggregation to yield globally consistent and conflict-resilient predictions. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets, across multiple LLM backbones and diverse multi-agent configurations, demonstrate that SIGMA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving notable gains in both accuracy and conflict-resilient performance.

</details>


### [231] [What and When to Distill: Selective Hindsight Distillation for Multi-Turn Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19447)
*Xiaozhe Li,Tianyi Lyu,Yang Li,Yichuan Ma,Peiji Li,Linyang Li,Qipeng Guo,Dahua Lin,Kai Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出SERL框架，通过选择性利用环境反馈（如错误信息、页面变化等）来优化强化学习中的信用分配，在ALFWorld和WebShop上分别达到90.0%和80.1%的成功率，优于现有RL和蒸馏方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL方法在长程信用分配上存在困难，仅依赖稀疏的任务奖励信号，未能充分利用多轮交互中每步的环境反馈（如错误信息、页面变化等），导致智能体难以从成功或失败的最终信号中学习到正确的行动分配。

Method: 系统研究了五种反馈源和两种插入粒度，提出SERL框架：任务奖励决定更新方向，环境反馈调整更新的位置和幅度，使模型聚焦于关键动作。

Result: 在ALFWorld上达到90.0%成功率，WebShop上达到80.1%成功率，优于强RL和蒸馏基线；分析表明基于行动的、有意义的反馈优于盲目使用更长或更丰富的上下文。

Conclusion: 选择性利用环境反馈能显著提升RL智能体在长程任务中的学习效率和性能，合理的反馈选择和插入粒度比简单地增加上下文长度更有效。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning can train LLM agents from sparse task rewards, but long-horizon credit assignment remains challenging: a single success-or-failure signal must be distributed across many actions. Existing methods rely on trajectory-level rewards or proxy signals, without fully leveraging per-step environmental feedback. Multi-turn agent settings are underexplored, where feedback can include error messages, page changes, observations, or reference trajectories. We systematically study five feedback sources and two insertion granularities and introduce SERL, a selective environment-reweighted learning framework. SERL uses the task reward to determine update direction, while environment feedback adjusts placement and magnitude, focusing on critical actions. On ALFWorld and WebShop, SERL achieves 90.0% and 80.1% success, outperforming strong RL and distillation baselines. Analysis shows that grounded, action-relevant feedback at meaningful points consistently outperforms indiscriminate use of longer or richer context.

</details>


### [232] [Generative Auto-Bidding with Unified Modeling and Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19457)
*Mingming Zhang,Feiqing Zhuang,Na Li,Shengjie Sun,Xiaowei Chen,Junxiong Zhu,Fei Xiao,Keping Yang,Lixin Zou,Chenliang Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GUIDE是一个结合决策Transformer与安全回退机制的生成式自动出价框架，通过“探索-保护-选择”流程实现高效与安全的平衡，在淘宝线上部署中取得显著效果提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动出价方法中，规则方法缺乏适应性，强化学习方法难以处理长期依赖，生成模型虽有效但缺乏显式的探索与安全平衡机制，导致探索效率低且金融风险高。

Method: 提出GUIDE框架，包含三个核心模块：1) Decision Transformer统一建模历史出价行为与环境状态迁移；2) Q-value模块通过正则化约束引导DT的探索方向；3) 反向动力学模块利用DT预测的未来状态推断稳健动作作为安全回退策略，Q-value模块自适应选择最终动作，形成“探索-保护-选择”一体化流程。

Result: 在公开数据集、模拟拍卖环境和淘宝大规模线上部署中，GUIDE全面超越SOTA基线。线上效果：广告GMV+4.10%，广告点击+1.40%，广告花费+1.66%，广告ROI+3.52%。

Conclusion: GUIDE通过统一建模与引导式探索，有效解决了生成式自动出价中探索与安全的权衡问题，在实际工业场景中展现了显著的经济效益和强大的应用价值。

Abstract: Automated bidding is central to modern digital advertising. Early rule-based methods lacked adaptability, while subsequent Reinforcement Learning approaches modeled bidding as a Markov Decision Process but struggled with long-term dependencies. Recent generative models show promise, yet they lack explicit mechanisms to balance exploration and safety, relying solely on action perturbations or trajectory guidance without a safety fallback. This results in inefficient exploration and elevated financial risk for advertising platforms.
  To address this gap, we propose GUIDE (Generative Auto-Bidding with Unified Modeling and Exploration), a framework that synergistically integrates directed exploration with a safe fallback mechanism. GUIDE employs a Decision Transformer (DT) to jointly model historical bidding actions and environmental state transitions. A Q-value module guides the DT's exploration via regularization constraints, while an Inverse Dynamics Module (IDM) leverages DT-predicted future states to infer robust, behaviorally consistent actions as a safe policy fallback. The Q-value module then adaptively selects the final action between these two options, balancing exploration and safety. Together, these components form an integrated "explore-safeguard-select" pipeline that unifies efficiency and safety.
  We conduct extensive experiments on public datasets, in simulated auction environments, and through large-scale online deployment on Taobao, a leading Chinese advertising platform. Results show GUIDE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across all scenarios. In real-world deployment, GUIDE achieves notable gains: +4.10% ad GMV, +1.40% ad clicks, +1.66% ad cost, and +3.52% ad ROI, demonstrating its effectiveness and strong industrial applicability.

</details>


### [233] [Beyond Mode Collapse: Distribution Matching for Diverse Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19461)
*Xiaozhe Li,Yang Li,Xinyu Fang,Shengyuan Ding,Peiji Li,Yongkang Chen,Yichuan Ma,Tianyi Lyu,Linyang Li,Dahua Lin,Qipeng Guo,Qingwen Liu,Kai Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了DMPO（分布匹配策略优化）方法，通过前向KL散度的近似优化来防止on-policy强化学习中的模式崩溃问题，在组合优化、数学推理等任务上取得了一致改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: On-policy强化学习方法（如GRPO）存在模式崩溃问题：一旦发现一个高奖励的解，就会集中概率质量在该解上，停止探索其他策略。作者指出这源于反向KL最小化的mode-seeking行为。

Method: DMPO通过原则性的前向KL最小化近似来防止模式崩溃。它构建一个组级别的目标分布（与轨迹奖励成比例），然后将策略分布对齐到该目标分布，实现mode-covering行为，无需从全局目标分布中采样。

Result: 在NP-Bench文本版上Quality Ratio达43.9%（GRPO为40.1%），视觉版达43.1%（GRPO为38.4%），相对提升9%和12%。数学推理提升2.0%，跨领域任务提升2.3%。

Conclusion: 分布匹配是一种实用且原则性的方法，可以有效防止on-policy RL中的模式崩溃，通过保持多样性来提升跨模态的通用推理能力。

Abstract: On-policy reinforcement learning methods like GRPO suffer from mode collapse: they exhibit reduced solution diversity, concentrating probability mass on a single solution once discovered and ceasing exploration of alternative strategies. We show this stems from reverse KL minimization's mode-seeking behavior, which reinforces the first high-reward trajectory found rather than maintaining a distribution over multiple diverse solutions. We propose DMPO (Distribution-Matching Policy Optimization), which prevents mode collapse through principled approximation of forward KL minimization. DMPO constructs a group level target distribution over sampled trajectories proportional to their rewards, then aligns the policy distribution to this target. This provides mode-covering behavior without requiring sampling from the intractable global target distribution, enabling sustained exploration throughout training. We validate DMPO on NP-hard combinatorial optimization, where exponentially many feasible solutions exist but only a few approach optimality, an ideal testbed for evaluating exploration. DMPO achieves 43.9% Quality Ratio on text-based NP-Bench (vs. GRPO's 40.1%) and 43.1% on vision-based NP-Bench (vs. 38.4%), demonstrating 9% and 12% relative improvements respectively. These gains generalize to mathematical reasoning (+2.0%) and out-of-domain tasks (+2.3%), showing that diversity-preserving training enhances general reasoning capabilities across modalities. Our work establishes distribution matching as a practical, principled approach to preventing mode collapse in on-policy RL, with consistent quality improvements demonstrating sustained exploration across diverse reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [234] [Attention-Guided Reward for Reinforcement Learning-based Jailbreak against Large Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19485)
*Zheng Lin,Zhenxing Niu,Haoxuan Ji,Yuzhe Huang,Haichang Gao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现大推理模型（LRM）的越狱攻击成功率与其注意力模式密切相关，并提出一种基于强化学习的越狱方法，通过将注意力信号纳入奖励函数、引入多样化说服策略，在多个模型和基准上实现了更高的攻击成功率、效率和可迁移性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大推理模型因其逐步推理的生成方式引入了额外的安全风险，现有研究表明LRM比标准LLM更容易受到越狱攻击，因此需要深入探究其脆弱性机理并开发更有效的攻击方法。

Method: 1) 发现LRM的越狱成功率与注意力模式相关：成功攻击对输入提示中的有害token分配较低注意力，而对推理内容中的有害token分配较高注意力；2) 提出基于强化学习的越狱方法，将注意力信号显式纳入奖励函数设计；3) 引入多样化说服策略来丰富强化学习的动作空间。

Result: 在五个开源和闭源LRM上、三个基准测试中的大量实验表明，所提方法在攻击成功率、效率和可迁移性方面均显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 注意力模式是LRM越狱攻击的关键因素，基于强化学习结合注意力信号的攻击方法能有效提升攻击效果，且具有良好的可迁移性。

Abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in solving complex problems by generating structured, step-by-step reasoning content. However, exposing a model's internal reasoning process introduces additional safety risks; for example, recent studies show that LRMs are more vulnerable to jailbreak attacks than standard LLMs. In this paper, we investigate jailbreak attacks on LRMs and reveal that the attack success rate (ASR) is closely correlated with LRMs' attention patterns. Specifically, successful jailbreaks tend to assign lower attention to harmful tokens in the input prompt, while allocating higher attention to those tokens in the reasoning content. Motivated by this finding, we propose a novel jailbreak method for LRMs that leverages reinforcement learning (RL) to enhance attack effectiveness, explicitly incorporating attention signals into the reward function design. In addition, we introduce diverse persuasion strategies to enrich the RL action space, which consistently improves the ASR. Extensive experiments on five open-source and closed-source LRMs across three benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves substantially higher ASR, outperforming existing approaches in terms of effectiveness, efficiency, and transferability.

</details>


### [235] [Position: The Turing-Completeness of Real-World Autoregressive Transformers Relies Heavily on Context Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19514)
*Guanyu Cui,Zhewei Wei,Kun He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文澄清了Transformer图灵完备性研究中两种不同设定（固定系统 vs. 缩放家族）的区别，指出许多声称Transformer图灵完备的证明实际上是在缩放家族设定下完成的，而非更贴近真实LLM部署的固定系统设定，并论证了上下文管理方法对计算能力的关键影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献混淆了固定Transformer系统与缩放家族两种不同设定，导致对Transformer图灵完备性的声称存在普遍误解。作者希望澄清这一混淆，明确不同设定下的计算能力差异。

Method: 首先形式化定义了固定系统设定，刻画真实LLM的运行方式；然后对比两种设定，论证缩放家族下的结果不能直接等价于图灵完备性；最后通过分析不同上下文管理方法对计算能力的影响来支撑核心论点。

Result: 证明缩放家族设定下的结果提供了有理论意义的资源边界，但不能确立图灵完备性；不同上下文管理方法会导致截然不同的计算能力；上下文管理是决定真实自回归Transformer计算能力的关键组件。

Conclusion: 真实LLM对应的固定系统设定与缩放家族设定有本质区别，研究者应正视上下文管理在Transformer计算能力中的核心地位，避免对图灵完备性结果的误读。

Abstract: Many works make the eye-catching claim that Transformers are Turing-complete. However, the literature often conflates two distinct settings: (i) a fixed Transformer system setting, in which a fixed autoregressive Transformer is coupled with a fixed context-management method to process inputs of different lengths step by step, and (ii) a scaling-family setting, in which a family of different models (with increasing context-window length or numerical precision) is used to handle different input lengths. Existing proofs of Transformer Turing-completeness are frequently established in setting (ii), whereas real-world LLM deployment and the standard notion of Turing-completeness correspond more naturally to setting (i). In this paper, we first formalize the fixed-system setting, thereby providing a concrete characterization of how real-world LLMs operate. We then argue that results proved in the scaling-family setting provide theoretically meaningful resource bounds but do not establish Turing-completeness, thereby clarifying a common misinterpretation of existing results. Finally, we show that different context-management methods can yield sharply different computational power, and we advocate the position that context management is a central component that critically determines the computational power of real-world autoregressive Transformers.

</details>


### [236] [BLINKG: A Benchmark for LLM-Integrated Knowledge Graph Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19518)
*Carla Castedo,Enrique Iglesias,Manuel Lama,Alberto Bugarin-Diz,Maria-Esther Vidal,David Chaves-Fraga*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出BLINKG基准测试，用于评估大语言模型在从异构数据源构建知识图谱时的映射能力，实验表明LLMs虽有潜力但在复杂场景下表现有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 知识图谱构建过程耗时费力，现有声明式方案仍需要大量人工对齐输入数据模式与本体术语，缺乏标准化评估框架来衡量LLMs在建立数据方案与本体概念之间对应关系的有效性。

Method: 设计BLINKG基准测试，包含一系列基于真实用例、复杂度递增的场景，利用该基准对多个主流LLMs进行广泛实验评估，并定义实现（半）自动化LLM驱动知识图谱构建的需求集。

Result: LLMs在知识图谱构建中已展现出有前景的解决方案，但在复杂场景下性能仍然有限。

Conclusion: BLINKG基准可评估LLMs当前的知识图谱构建能力，所定义的需求集为（半）自动化LLM驱动的知识图谱构建开辟了新的研究方向。

Abstract: Generating Knowledge Graphs (KGs) remains one of the most time-consuming and labor-intensive tasks for knowledge engineers, as they need to identify semantic equivalences between input data sources and ontology terms. While declarative solutions (e.g., RML, SPARQL-Anything) have helped to generalize this process, aligning input schema elements with ontology terms still involves intricate transformations and requires considerable manual effort. With the advent of Large Language Models (LLMs), there is growing interest in leveraging their capabilities to assist KG engineers. Although some studies have explored using LLMs to automate KG construction, there is still no standardized framework for assessing how effectively they establish correspondences between data schemes and ontology concepts. Therefore, in this paper, we propose BLINKG, a benchmark designed to evaluate the mapping capabilities of LLMs in constructing KGs from heterogeneous data sources. The benchmark includes a set of scenarios with increasing complexity, based on real-world use cases. We conduct an extensive experimental evaluation of several stateof-the-art LLMs using BLINK and observe that they already offer promising solutions. However, their performance remains limited in complex scenarios. Thanks to this benchmark, we can already assess the current capabilities of LLMs for KG construction. Additionally, we define a set of requirements for achieving (semi)automated (LLM-driven) KG construction, opening new research lines in this area.

</details>


### [237] [Generative-Evaluative Agreement: A Necessary Validity Criterion for LLM-Enabled Adaptive Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19529)
*Grandee Lee,Yue Wang,Che Yee Lye,Luke Peh*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出生成-评估一致性（GEA）作为LLM自生成题目、模拟作答和评分的有效性标准，发现两阶段自适应评估中模型仅恢复约一半预期方差（r=0.698），语法可验证技能GEA强（r>0.7），设计类技能接近零，存在系统性正向偏差和低技能高估问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决LLM同时承担生成题目、模拟学生回答和评分时形成的自我指涉验证循环问题，需要有效的有效性标准来衡量这种自洽性。

Method: 提出生成-评估一致性（GEA）指标，测量LLM的评分函数是否能恢复其生成函数预设的技能水平，在两阶段自适应评估中直接测量。

Result: r=0.698，恢复约一半预期方差；语法可验证技能GEA强（r>0.7），设计技能接近零；存在系统性正向偏差和低技能高估。

Conclusion: 粒度细、按技能分解的评分标准是增强GEA的主要机制，并概述了补充性缓解措施。

Abstract: When the same LLM generates assessment items, simulates student responses, and scores them, the validation loop is self-referential. We introduce Generative-Evaluative Agreement (GEA), a validity criterion measuring whether an LLM's scoring function recovers the skill levels its generative function was instructed to produce. In the first direct measurement of GEA on a two-stage adaptive assessment, the model recovers roughly half the intended variance r = 0.698 with systematic positive bias. GEA is strong r > 0.7 for syntactically verifiable skills but near zero for design-level skills, and low-skill overestimation inflates scores near the routing threshold. We argue that granular, skill-decomposed rubrics are the principal proposed mechanism for strengthening GEA and outline complementary mitigations.

</details>


### [238] [SceneCode: Executable World Programs for Editable Indoor Scenes with Articulated Objects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19587)
*Puyi Wang,Yuhao Wang,Linjie Li,Zhengyuan Yang,Kevin Qinghong Lin,Yangguang Li,Yu Cheng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SceneCode 是一个将自然语言提示编译为可执行、可交互的室内场景程序的框架，通过代码生成和程序化世界构建，取代传统的静态网格资产，实现物体级别的可控性和物理仿真就绪的资产产出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有室内场景合成方法通常生成静态网格资产，仅能从精选资产库中继承关节信息，限制了物体级别的可控性，也无法按需生成可交互的新资产。作者希望弥合这一差距，实现可交互、可物理仿真的程序化室内场景生成。

Method: 提出 SceneCode 框架：1) 房间级智能体主干将自然语言提示转化为结构化房屋布局，并通过规划-设计-批评循环发出逐物体资产请求；2) 每个请求被路由到五种代码生成策略之一，转化为合成的逐部件 Blender Python 程序；3) 通过执行引导的修复-优化循环进行验证；4) 程序编译为物理仿真就绪的资产，导出为 SDF 格式；5) 持久化场景状态注册表链接对象请求、可执行程序、渲染几何体和仿真资产。

Result: 在场景级合成、物体级资产质量、人类判断以及下游机器人交互四个维度上进行了评估。结果表明，可执行的场景程序能够生成更符合提示的室内场景，产生具有更清晰网格结构和物理仿真可加载关节元数据的资产。

Conclusion: SceneCode 通过程序化世界生成范式，成功将自然语言提示转化为可执行、可编辑、可物理仿真的室内场景，为具身智能和机器人仿真提供了更可控、更可追溯的室内场景合成方案。

Abstract: Indoor scene synthesis underpins embodied AI, robotic manipulation, and simulation-based policy evaluation, where a useful scene must specify not only what the environment looks like, but also how its objects are structured. Existing pipelines, however, typically represent generated content as static meshes and inherit articulation only from curated asset libraries, which limits object-level controllability and prevents new interactable assets from being produced on demand. We address this gap by formulating physically interactable indoor scene synthesis as programmatic world generation, and present SceneCode, a framework that compiles a natural language prompt into an executable, code-driven indoor world rather than a collection of opaque meshes. A room-level agentic backbone first turns the prompt into a structured house layout and emits per-object AssetRequests through a planner--designer--critic loop. Each request is then routed to one of five code-generation strategies and converted into a synthesized part-wise Blender Python programs that are validated through an execution-guided repair-and-refine loop. The resulting programs are compiled into simulation-ready assets, and exported as SDF for physics simulation. A persistent scene-state registry links object requests, executable programs, rendered geometry, and simulation assets, turning scene assembly into a traceable and locally editable world-building process. We evaluate SceneCode across scene-level synthesis, object-level asset quality, human judgment, and downstream robot interaction. Results show that executable world programs improve prompt-faithful indoor scene generation and produce assets with cleaner mesh structure, and simulator-loadable articulation metadata. Project page: https://scene-code.github.io/.

</details>


### [239] [Towards Multi-Model LLM Schedulers: Empirical Insights into Offloading and Preemption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19593)
*Mert Yildiz,Pietro Spadaccino,Alexey Rolich,Francesca Cuomo,Andrea Baiocchi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了多LLM在异构硬件上混合部署时的调度挑战，发现模型卸载敏感度、抢占开销（主要由模型状态重载主导）及序列长度/互联带宽对性能的影响，为未来调度器设计提供了关键指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有系统主要优化单模型吞吐量，缺乏对多模型在GPU内存受限、需CPU-GPU混合卸载和抢占条件下调度问题的研究。

Method: 通过实证研究，分析不同LLM在不同硬件平台上的行为，重点考察层卸载和抢占对解码吞吐量的影响，并测量模型状态重载、KV缓存传输等开销。

Result: 1) 卸载导致非线性且模型相关的解码吞吐下降，小模型对GPU驻留减少更敏感；2) 抢占开销主要由模型状态重载主导，而非KV缓存传输；3) 序列长度和互联带宽放大数据传输和执行低效。

Conclusion: 未来调度器需考虑模型特定卸载敏感度、工作负载特征及抢占/数据传输成本结构，以高效管理异构多模型工作负载。

Abstract: Modern deployments of Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly require serving multiple models with diverse architectures, sizes, and specialization on shared, heterogeneous hardware. This setting introduces new challenges for resource allocation, dispatching, and scheduling, particularly under GPU memory constraints where partial CPU-GPU offloading and preemption become necessary. While existing systems primarily optimize throughput for a single model, comparatively little work addresses multi-model scheduling under these conditions. In this paper, we present an empirical study of how different LLMs behave across hardware platforms, focusing on the performance implications of layer offloading and preemption. We show that offloading leads to strongly non-linear and model-dependent degradation in decode throughput, with smaller models exhibiting sharper sensitivity to reduced GPU residency. We further demonstrate that preemption incurs substantial overhead, largely dominated by model state reload rather than key-value cache transfer, and that this cost varies significantly across models and hardware platforms. Additionally, we highlight the role of sequence length and interconnect bandwidth in amplifying data movement and execution inefficiencies. Based on these findings, we identify a set of key features that future schedulers must consider, including model-specific offloading sensitivity, workload characteristics, and the cost structure of preemption and data transfer. These insights provide guidance for the design of next-generation LLM serving systems capable of efficiently managing heterogeneous, multi-model workloads with hybrid CPU-GPU execution.

</details>


### [240] [Formal Skill: Programmable Runtime Skills for Efficient and Accurate LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19604)
*Xi Zhang,Meijun Gao,Yuntian Zhao,Xinyu Tan,Yilun Yao,Feiyu Wang,Yanshu Wang,Dingsiyi,Tong Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Formal Skill抽象，通过JSON元数据、Python执行器、钩子策略和本地状态将可复用能力封装为可执行状态机，并在FairyClaw运行时中实现，在Harness-Bench上以更少token取得高竞争力结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体的技能表达方式（如Markdown技能、指令包、函数调用、MCP服务器等）存在不足：要么是冗长的自然语言文档，要么只结构化单个动作但缺少工作流状态、策略执行和完成规约的内建支持。作者希望将可复用过程从重复的提示文本迁移到可执行的状态机和钩子策略中，提供token高效且可强制执行的技能抽象。

Method: 提出Formal Skill抽象，包含JSON元数据与动作模式、可靠的Python执行器、钩子控制的逻辑、Formal Skill路由以及技能本地运行时状态。实现FairyClaw开源事件驱动运行时，支持可执行、可观测和可组合的Formal Skills。

Result: 在Harness-Bench上，FairyClaw在取得极具竞争力的平均分数的同时，使用的token数量大幅减少，在突出Formal Skill作用的任务上表现尤为强劲。

Conclusion: Formal Skill作为一种推理时原生抽象，能够更高效地将模型推理转化为可靠行动，为LLM智能体在真实工作空间中的技能表达和执行提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly act inside real workspaces, where tools and skills determine whether model reasoning becomes reliable action. Existing skills remain largely informal: Markdown skills and instruction packs encode procedures as long natural-language documents, while function calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and framework tools structure individual actions but usually leave workflow state, policy enforcement, and completion discipline outside the skill itself. We introduce Formal Skill, a runtime-native abstraction that represents reusable capability with JSON metadata and action schemas, reliable Python executors, hook-governed control logic, Formal Skill routing, and skill-local runtime state. By moving reusable procedure from repeated prompt text into executable state machines and hook policies, Formal Skill gives agents a token-efficient and enforceable control surface. We implement the abstraction in FairyClaw, an open-source event-driven runtime for executable, observable, and composable Formal Skills. On Harness-Bench, FairyClaw obtains highly competitive average scores while using substantially fewer tokens, with especially strong results on tasks that expose the role of Formal Skill.

</details>


### [241] [EMO-BOOST: Emotion-Augmented Audio-Visual Features for Improved Generalization in Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19630)
*Aritra Marik,Marcel Klemt,Anna Rohrbach*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Emo-Boost 是一个多模态深度伪造检测框架，利用情感作为高级语义线索，结合RGB和音频检测器与情感检测器EmoForensics，通过捕捉跨模态情感时间一致性来提升对未见过的深度伪造的泛化能力，在FakeAVCeleb数据集上平均交叉操作泛化AUC提升2.1%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI模型的不断进步使得传统取证方法难以收集每种操作的数据进行训练，因此深度伪造检测需要泛化到训练时未见过的伪造类型。现有方法主要依赖低级特征，缺乏对高级语义线索的利用。

Method: 提出Emo-Boost框架，融合现有的RGB和音频深度伪造检测器与基于情感的EmoForensics检测器。EmoForensics利用视觉和音频情感识别模块，建模视听流中情感表示的模态内和模态间时间一致性。

Result: 在FakeAVCeleb数据集上，EmoForensics与低级方法捕捉互补信号，结合两者后Emo-Boost将平均交叉操作泛化AUC提升2.1%。

Conclusion: 高级语义线索（如情感）可以支持低级方法在泛化到未见过的操作类型方面取得更好效果，多模态融合策略有效提升了深度伪造检测的跨操作泛化能力。

Abstract: With every advancement in generative AI models, forensics is under increasing pressure. The constant emergence of new generation techniques makes it impossible to collect data for each manipulation to train a deepfake detection model. Thus, generalizing to deepfakes unseen during training is one of the major challenges in current deepfake detection research. To tackle this challenge, we employ high-level semantic cues and argue that these cues can support low-level focused approaches in generalizing to unseen types of manipulations. In this work, we study emotions as a high-level semantic cue. We propose Emo-Boost, a multimodal deepfake detection framework that fuses an off-the-shelf RGB- and acoustic-focused deepfake detector with our emotion-based deepfake detector EmoForensics. EmoForensics utilises vision and audio emotion recognition modules and models intra- and inter-modal temporal consistency in emotion representations from an audio-visual stream. We found that EmoForensics and the low-level focused method capture complementary signals. Consequently, combining both signals in EmoBoost enhances the average cross-manipulation generalization AUC by 2.1% on FakeAVCeleb.

</details>


### [242] [When Tabular Foundation Models Meet Strategic Tabular Data: A Prior Alignment Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19662)
*Xinpeng Lv,Yunxin Mao,Renzhe Xu,Chunyuan Zheng,Yikai Chen,Haoxuan Li,Jinxuan Yang,Kun Kuang,Yuanlong Chen,Mingyang Geng,Wanrong Huang,Shixuan Liu,Shaowu Yang,Wenjing Yang,Zhouchen Lin,Haotian Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出SPN框架，通过策略感知的推理时上下文学习，使基于PFN的表格基础模型能够适应策略性数据分布偏移，无需重新训练即可提升鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格基础模型（PFN）在非策略场景中表现优异，但现实决策中个体可能策略性地修改特征以获取有利结果，导致数据分布偏移。需要研究PFN模型能否泛化到这种策略性表格数据场景。

Method: 提出Strategic Prior-data Fitted Network (SPN)，一种推理时策略感知框架。通过构建策略性上下文示例来近似后操纵输入，使PFN预测与诱导的策略分布对齐，无需重新训练模型。

Result: 在真实和合成表格数据集上，SPN在策略性操纵下相比表格基础模型和经典表格方法，持续提升了鲁棒性和预测性能。

Conclusion: SPN有效弥合了预训练非策略先验与后操纵策略先验之间的不匹配，为表格基础模型在策略性环境中的应用提供了可行的推理时适配方案。

Abstract: Tabular foundation models based on pretrained prior-data fitted networks~(PFNs) have shown strong generalization on diverse tabular tasks, but they are typically designed for \emph{non-strategic} settings where data distributions are independent of deployed classifiers. In many real-world decision scenarios, however, individuals may strategically modify their features after deployment to obtain favorable outcomes, inducing a post-deployment distribution shift. This paper studies whether PFN-style tabular foundation models can generalize to such \emph{strategic} tabular data. We show that strategic manipulation creates a mismatch between the non-strategic prior learned during pretraining and the post-manipulation strategic prior, which leads to systematic prediction bias. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{Strategic Prior-data Fitted Network}~\textit{(SPN)}, an inference-time strategy-aware framework that adapts tabular foundation models to strategic environments without retraining. SPN constructs strategic in-context examples to approximate post-manipulation inputs and aligns PFN predictions with the induced strategic distribution. Experiments on real-world and synthetic tabular datasets show that SPN consistently improves robustness and predictive performance under strategic manipulation compared with both tabular foundation models and classical tabular methods.

</details>


### [243] [Pseudocode-Guided Structured Reasoning for Automating Reliable Inference in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19663)
*Weicong Ni,Tianbao Jiang,Linlin Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出PStar框架，通过伪代码引导的结构化推理和难度特征向量（DFV）自适应选择推理策略，显著降低VLM的幻觉率，在POPE和MMStar上达到SOTA性能，超越GPT-4V。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLM在机器人自动化中易产生幻觉，导致决策错误，带来安全性和可靠性风险；且真实世界任务具有开放性和难度多样性，现有方法缺乏鲁棒且自适应的推理策略。

Method: 设计抽象推理函数并构建结构化伪代码库，提出难度特征向量（DFV）评估问题复杂度，自适应选择伪代码推理路径，实现灵活且逐步的推理。

Result: POPE得分87.1%，MMStar得分68.0%，均达到SOTA，超越GPT-4V，显著降低幻觉率。

Conclusion: PStar提供了一种减少视觉-语言错误的验证机制，是向在真实自动化系统中部署更可信赖、确定性的VLM迈出的关键一步。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are becoming the cornerstone of high-level reasoning for robotic automation, enabling robots to parse natural language commands and perceive their environments. However, their susceptibility to hallucinations introduces critical failures in decision-making, posing significant safety and reliability risks in physical deployments. This challenge is exacerbated by the open-ended nature of real-world tasks, where questions vary vastly in difficulty and modality, demanding robust and adaptable reasoning strategies. To tackle this, we propose the Pseudocode-guided Structured Reasoning framework (PStar), which adaptively selects structured pseudocode reasoning paths to help VLMs perform flexible and step-by-step reasoning. We first design a set of abstract reasoning functions and formulate a structured pseudocode library to represent modular reasoning strategies. Crucially, we design a Difficulty Feature Vector (DFV) that allows the model to assess question complexity and adaptively choose appropriate reasoning strategies-enhancing robustness and interpretability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PStar significantly reduces hallucination rates, achieving state-of-the-art scores of 87.1% on POPE and 68.0% on MMStar, outperforming even GPT-4V. By providing a validated mechanism to reduce visual-language errors, PStar offers a critical step toward deploying more trustworthy and deterministic VLMs for real-world automated systems, where such errors can lead to catastrophic outcomes.

</details>


### [244] [Transforming Constraint Programs to Input for Local Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19671)
*Jo Devriendt,Patrick De Causmaecker,Marc Denecker*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种从约束规格说明自动生成局部搜索邻域的方法，利用对称性质，并在IDP系统中实现，通过六个经典优化问题验证了该技术的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上，将约束编译为元启发式算法的输入数据需要人工干预，过程繁琐。本文旨在建立约束优化问题的对称性与局部搜索邻域之间的联系，从而实现邻域的自动生成，减少人工成本。

Method: 在IDP系统框架下，利用约束优化问题的对称性属性，从约束规格说明中自动推导并生成局部搜索邻域。

Result: 在六个经典优化问题上对生成的邻域进行了评估，实验结果支持该技术的可行性。

Conclusion: 该方法能够自动生成有效的局部搜索邻域，为减少人工干预提供了一种可行的技术路径。

Abstract: Applying local search algorithms to combinatorial optimization problems is not an easy feat. Typically, human intervention is required to compile the constraints to input data for some metaheuristic algorithm. In this paper, we establish a link between symmetry properties of constraint optimization problems and local search neighborhoods, and we use this link to automatically generate neighborhoods from a constraint specification in the context of the IDP system. We evaluate the obtained neighborhoods for six classical optimization problems. The resulting observations support the viability of this technique.

</details>


### [245] [Beyond Rational Illusion: Behaviorally Realistic Strategic Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19674)
*Xinpeng Lv,Yunxin Mao,Renzhe Xu,Chunyuan Zheng,Yikai Chen,Haoxuan Li,Yang Shi,Jinxuan Yang,Zhouchen Lin,Yuanlong Chen,Yuanxing Zhang,Shaowu Yang,Wenjing Yang,Haotian Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种行为现实性策略分类问题，并基于前景理论构建了Pro-SF框架，以模拟和应对代理人在认知偏差下的非理性策略操纵行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有策略分类框架假设代理人是完全理性的，但行为经济学和心理学证据表明现实中的决策常受认知偏差影响。本文旨在弥补这一理想化假设与现实之间的差距。

Method: 提出Prospect-Guided Strategic Framework (Pro-SF)，基于前景理论重构了代理人与决策者之间的Stackelberg博弈交互，引入三种机制：收益与成本的不对称性、主观参考点差异、非理性概率扭曲。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验验证了Pro-SF的有效性，表明其能够很好的建模行为现实性下的策略分类问题。

Conclusion: Pro-SF提供了一种连接机器学习与行为经济学的桥梁，为现实世界中更可靠的策略分类部署奠定了基础。

Abstract: Strategic classification(SC) studies the interaction between decision models and agents who strategically manipulate their features for favorable outcomes. Existing SC frameworks typically rely on the idealized assumption that agents are strictly rational. However, evidence from behavioral economics and psychology consistently shows that real-world decision-making is often shaped by cognitive biases, deviating from pure rationality. To formalize this limitation, we identify and define a new problem setting, termed the behaviorally realistic strategic classification problem, where agents' strategic manipulations deviate from full rationality due to psychological biases. Motivated by the identified limitation, we propose the Prospect-Guided Strategic Framework (Pro-SF) to address the problem, a principled framework grounded in prospect theory to model and learn under behaviorally realistic strategic responses. Specifically, to capture behaviorally realistic strategic manipulations, our framework reformulates the Stackelberg-style interaction between agents and the decision-maker by incorporating three key mechanisms inspired by prospect theory, including the asymmetry between benefits and costs, different subjective reference points, and non-rational probability distortion. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets establish Pro-SF as a behaviorally grounded approach to strategic classification, bridging machine learning and behavioral economics for more reliable deployment in the real world.

</details>


### [246] [Projecting Latent RL Actions: Towards Generalizable and Scalable Graph Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19721)
*Franco Terranova,Guillermo Bernardez,Albert Cabellos-Aparicio,Nina Miolane,Abdelkader Lahmadi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出投影智能体方法，通过连续GNN动作嵌入空间直接预测潜在动作并解码为离散动作，解决了RL-GCO的泛化性和扩展性问题，实现高达16.2倍推理加速和40%更好的泛化性能，并开源LaGCO-RL库。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图组合优化（GCO）中的NP-hard问题因组合爆炸导致精确方法计算不可行，现有RL-GCO方法在跨图实例泛化性和动作空间扩展性方面存在局限。

Method: 提出投影智能体（projection agents），在连续GNN动作嵌入空间中直接预测潜在动作（单次前向传播），再解码为有效离散动作；通过共享观测和动作的嵌入空间实现不同RL方法的公平比较。

Result: 在多个基准上，仅用简单最近邻解码即实现高达16.2倍推理加速和40%更好的泛化性能，在超线性决策空间中展现出强RL性能。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了RL-GCO的泛化性和扩展性挑战，开源的LaGCO-RL库有助于推动可复现研究和新基准的适配。

Abstract: Graph combinatorial optimization (GCO) has attracted growing interest, as many NP-hard problems naturally admit graph formulations, yet their combinatorial explosion renders exact methods computationally intractable. Recent advances in Reinforcement Learning (RL) combined with Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have significantly improved learning-based GCO solvers. However, existing approaches face limitations in both generalization across diverse graph instances and computational scalability as action spaces grow. To address both challenges, we introduce projection agents, a novel RL-GCO approach that operates directly in a continuous GNN-based action embedding space, predicting a desired latent action in a single forward pass and subsequently decoding it into a valid discrete action. Additionally, we enable fair comparison across RL methods through a shared embedding space for both observations and actions. Across diverse benchmarks, our approach achieves up to 16.2x faster inference and up to 40% better generalization than existing solutions using only simple nearest-neighbor decoding, while opening the door to strong RL performance in super-linear decision spaces with multiple interdependent variables. Finally, we release LaGCO-RL, a Python library that automates latent action-space construction and supports existing RL-GCO solutions, promoting reproducibility and adaptation to new GCO benchmarks.

</details>


### [247] [EngiAI: A Multi-Agent Framework and Benchmark Suite for LLM-Driven Engineering Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19743)
*Gioele Molinari,Florian Felten,Soheyl Massoudi,Mark Fuge*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个面向工程设计的LLM多智能体系统评估基准(EngiBench)，包含工作流、RAG和HPC三个评估维度，并给出了参考实现EngiAI。实验发现闭源模型表现优异(96-97%)，开源小模型差距明显(55-78%)，条件分支是最困难的测试项(20-53%)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的评估框架没有充分涵盖结合仿真、检索和制造准备的多智能体系统，需要针对工程设计场景下的LLM智能体能力进行系统评估。

Method: EngiBench包含三个基准：(1) 工作流基准，设计7种提示风格测试不同认知需求；(2) RAG基准，通过门控评分隔离检索贡献；(3) HPC基准，评估SLURM集群上的端到端ML训练编排。同时提出EngiAI参考实现，基于LangGraph的7个专业智能体通过监督架构协同工作。

Result: 闭源模型在Beams2D上达到96-97%任务完成率，4B开源模型为55-78%。条件分支任务在Photonics2D上降至20-53%。RAG门控验证显示检索增强得分接近1.0，无检索接近零。HPC编排中最佳模型100%完成，最差仅50%。

Conclusion: 多智能体系统在工程设计领域具有潜力，但条件分支和多步指令跟随仍是关键挑战；开源小模型存在明显代际差距；RAG对参数选择至关重要；长流程工作流中指令跟随能力会退化。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly applied to engineering design tasks, yet existing evaluation frameworks do not adequately address multi-agent systems that combine simulation, retrieval, and manufacturing preparation. We introduce a benchmark suite with three evaluation dimensions: (1) a workflow benchmark with seven prompt styles targeting distinct cognitive demands-including direct tool use, semantic disambiguation, conditional branching, and working-memory tasks; (2) a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) benchmark with gated scoring isolating retrieval contributions to parameter selection; and (3) an High Performance Computing (HPC) benchmark evaluating end-to-end ML training orchestration on a SLURM cluster. Alongside the benchmark we present EngiAI, a Multi-Agent System (MAS) reference implementation built on LangGraph that operationalizes the benchmark by coordinating seven specialized agents through a supervisor architecture, unifying topology optimization, document retrieval, HPC job orchestration, and 3D printer control. Across four LLM backends and two EngiBench problems, proprietary models achieve 96-97% average task completion on Beams2D, while open-source 4B-parameter models reach 55-78%, with clear generational improvement. Conditional branching proves most challenging, with task completion dropping to 20-53% for the conditional style on Photonics2D. RAG gating confirms near-perfect retrieval-augmented scores ($\approx 1.0$) versus near-zero without retrieval, validating the evaluation design. On HPC orchestration, one model completes all pipeline steps in 100% of runs while another drops to 50%, revealing that multi-step instruction following degrades over long-running workflows.

</details>


### [248] [Memory-Augmented Reinforcement Learning Agent for CAD Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19748)
*Yin Xiaolong,Liu Yu,Shen Jiahang,Lu Xingyu,Ni Jingzhe,Fan Fengxiao,Sang Fan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种记忆增强的强化学习框架用于CAD生成代理，通过封装几何内核、双轨记忆模块（案例库+技能库）和动态效用检索算法，实现了复杂CAD模型的自校正与持续演化生成，显著提升了成功率和几何一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的CAD生成方法在处理具有长操作序列、多样操作类型和强几何约束的复杂CAD模型时表现不佳，主要是因为推理链容易断裂且缺乏有效的错误纠正机制。

Method: 提出了一种记忆增强的强化学习框架，包含：(1) 将底层几何内核封装为结构化工具链供代理调用；(2) 设计闭环机制（设计意图理解→全局规划→执行→多维验证）；(3) 双轨记忆模块（案例库+技能库）及动态效用检索算法；(4) 引入强化学习进行检索和策略优化，实现在线自校正和持续演化。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在复杂CAD模型生成任务上显著提升了成功率和几何一致性。

Conclusion: 该框架通过强化学习和记忆增强机制，有效解决了复杂CAD生成中推理断裂和错误累积问题，无需额外大规模标注数据即可实现自我进化。

Abstract: Automatic generation of computer-aided design (CAD) models is a core technology for enabling intelligence in advanced manufacturing. Existing generation methods based on large language models (LLMs) often fall short when handling complex CAD models characterized by long operation sequences, diverse operation types, and strong geometric constraints, primarily because reasoning chains break and effective error-correction mechanisms are lacking. To address this problem, this paper proposes a memory-augmented reinforcement learning framework for CAD generation agents. The framework encapsulates the underlying geometric kernel into a structured toolchain callable by the agent and builds a closed-loop mechanism of design intent understanding, global planning, execution, and multi-dimensional verification. It also designs a dual-track memory module consisting of a case library and a skill library, and proposes a dynamic utility retrieval algorithm. By introducing reinforcement learning into retrieval and policy optimization, the agent can effectively avoid retrieval traps in which examples are semantically similar but geometrically infeasible, enabling online self-correction and continual evolution without additional large-scale annotated data. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly improves both the success rate and geometric consistency on complex CAD model generation tasks.

</details>


### [249] [CogScale: Scalable Benchmark for Sequence Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19758)
*Yannis Bendi-Ouis,Romain de Coudenhove,Xavier Hinaut*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了CogScale基准，包含14个可扩展的合成任务，用于评估不同架构的认知和记忆能力，并在严格参数预算下测试了7种架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法评估新架构的序列信息处理能力需要大规模数据集和模型，计算成本高、迭代周期长，缺乏轻量级标准化评估框架。

Method: 设计了CogScale基准，包含14个可参数化规模的可扩展合成任务，在1k/10k/100k参数预算下评估GRU、LSTM、xLSTM、ESN、Mamba、Transformer Decoder和Encoder-Decoder七种架构。

Result: 经典RNN和ESN在严格参数预算下的基础记忆任务中表现出色，但只有注意力机制和现代状态空间模型能在推理复杂度和任务难度增加时保持高性能。

Conclusion: CogScale可作为轻量级标准化框架，帮助研究者快速验证架构创新，减少大规模训练前的迭代成本。

Abstract: The ability to maintain and manipulate information over time is a fundamental aspect of living beings and Artificial Intelligence. While modern models have achieved remarkable success in tasks like natural language processing, evaluating the capacity of novel architectures to process sequential information remains computationally expensive and time-consuming. Testing a new architecture often requires scaling up to massive datasets and models, leading to vast computational costs and slow iteration cycles. In this paper, we propose CogScale, a benchmark of 14 scalable synthetic tasks designed to isolate and evaluate specific cognitive and memory abilities at different parametrizable scales. By providing a standardized, lightweight framework, CogScale allows researchers to rapidly validate architectural innovations before committing to large-scale training. To establish a solid baseline, we evaluate seven distinct architectures: Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU), Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), xLSTM, Echo State Network (ESN), Mamba, Transformer Decoder, and Transformer Encoder-Decoder. These evaluations are conducted under strict parameter budgets (1k, 10k, and 100k) and across different difficulty levels and scales. Our results show that while classical RNNs and Echo State Networks excel at basic retention within strict parameter budgets, only attention mechanisms and modern state-space models consistently maintain high performance as reasoning complexity and task difficulty scale.

</details>


### [250] [What Really Improves Mathematical Reasoning: Structured Reasoning Signals Beyond Pure Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19762)
*Yuze Zhao,Junpeng Fang,Lu Yu,Zhenya Huang,Kai Zhang,Qing Cui,Qi Liu,Jun Zhou,Enhong Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模预训练实验发现，代码训练主要提升编程能力，而非通用推理能力；推理能力的提升更多源于跨域结构化推理数据（如代码-文本、数学-文本混合），而非可执行代码本身；增加数学域样本密度可在保持编程性能的同时显著提升复杂数学推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代码已成为现代语言模型训练的标准组成部分，但其在编程之外的作用尚不明确。作者希望重新审视"代码能提升推理能力"这一说法，通过可控的预训练实验来厘清代码在不同能力维度上的真实贡献。

Method: 在10T词元的语料上进行可控预训练实验，采用细粒度的域分离策略。通过控制代码类型（独立可执行程序 vs. 代码-文本数据）、跨域结构化推理数据（代码-文本、数学-文本混合）以及数学域样本密度等变量，分析不同数据组成对模型能力的影响，并结合专家激活模式进行路由分析。

Result: （1）代码提升编程能力但不作为通用推理增强剂，反而与知识密集型任务（尤其是复杂数学推理）存在竞争关系；（2）推理能力的提升更应归因于跨域结构化推理痕迹（如代码-文本、数学-文本混合），而非可执行代码本身；（3）在固定数学预算下增加结构化数学域样本密度，能在保持编程性能的同时大幅提升复杂数学推理能力；（4）数据组成效应反映在专家激活模式上，为域间竞争与协同提供了机制层面的证据。

Conclusion: 本文厘清了不同数据特征对模型能力维度的迁移效应，指出代码训练并非通用的推理增强手段，结构化推理数据才是关键。研究结果为更精准的数据中心优化策略提供了指导，并揭示了域间交互的机制性证据。

Abstract: Code has become a standard component of modern foundation language model (LM) training, yet its role beyond programming remains unclear. We revisit the claim that code improves reasoning through controlled pretraining experiments on a 10T-token corpus with fine-grained domain separation. Our findings are threefold. First, when code is restricted to standalone executable programs and Code-NL data are controlled for, code substantially improves programming ability but does not act as a general reasoning enhancer; instead, it competes with knowledge-intensive tasks, especially complex mathematical reasoning. Second, the reasoning gains often attributed to code are better explained by cross-domain structured reasoning traces, such as code-text and math-text mixtures, rather than by executable code alone. Third, increasing the density of structured math-domain samples within a fixed math budget yields substantial gains on difficult mathematical reasoning while largely preserving programming performance, suggesting that cognitive scaffolds offer a targeted way to mitigate cross-domain trade-offs. Finally, routing analyses show that data-composition effects are reflected in expert-activation patterns, providing mechanism-level evidence for competitive and synergistic interactions across domains. Our results clarify which data characteristics transfer across capability dimensions and point to more precise data-centric optimization strategies.

</details>


### [251] [GroupAffect-4: A Multimodal Dataset of Four-Person Collaborative Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19765)
*Meisam Jamshidi Seikavandi,Alice Modica,Anna Obara,Shan Ahmed Shaffi,Fabricio Batista Narcizo,Tanya Ignatenko,Ted Vucurevich,Karim Haddad,Daniel Barratt,Daniel Overholt,Jesper Bunsow Boldt,Paolo Burelli,Andrew Burke Dittberner*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文介绍了GroupAffect-4多模态语料库，包含40名参与者（10个四人小组）在四种协作任务中的生理、眼动、音频、自我报告、任务结果和人格数据，支持个体、人际和群体层面的情感分析，并提供了基准测试结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语料库缺乏对共处群体中情感作为个体、人际和群体耦合过程的分析支持，所需信号分散在不同数据集中。

Method: 采集40名参与者（10组×4人）完成信息整合、谈判、创意生成和公共物品游戏四种任务；使用腕戴生理传感器、眼动追踪眼镜和近讲麦克风；收集连续情感自评、任务后问卷、任务结果和大五人格分数，时间对齐；采用BIDS结构、Croissant元数据和数据表组织数据。

Result: 生理数据覆盖率超过91%，眼动数据覆盖率98%；谈判任务的情感操纵检验确认任务有效性；定义了三个分析层面的15个基准目标并报告了留一组交叉验证的可行性基线。

Conclusion: GroupAffect-4是一个高质量、多模态、支持多层次分析的群体情感语料库，公开可用，为群体情感计算研究提供了标准化基准。

Abstract: Existing affective-computing, social-signal-processing, and meeting corpora capture important parts of human interaction, but they rarely support analysis of affect in co-located groups as a coupled individual, interpersonal, and group-level process. The required signals (per-participant physiology, eye movement, audio, self-report, task outcomes, and personality) are usually fragmented across separate dataset traditions. We introduce GroupAffect-4, a multimodal corpus of 40 participants in 10 four-person groups, each completing four ecologically varied collaborative tasks spanning information pooling, negotiation, idea generation, and a public-goods game. Each participant is instrumented with a wrist-worn physiology sensor, eye-tracking glasses, and a close-talk microphone; sessions include continuous affect self-reports, post-task questionnaires, task outcomes, and Big-Five personality scores, all time-aligned to a shared clock. The dataset covers over 91% of expected physiology windows and 98% of eye-tracking windows, with strong task validity confirmed by a clear affective manipulation check across the negotiation block. We define fifteen benchmarkable targets spanning three analysis levels -- within-person state, between-person traits, and group dynamics -- and report leave-one-group-out feasibility baselines establishing the dataset's evaluative scope. GroupAffect-4 is released with a BIDS-inspired structure, Croissant metadata, a datasheet, per-session quality reports, and open processing scripts. Code and processing scripts are available at https://github.com/meisamjam/GroupAffect-4; the dataset is publicly archived at https://zenodo.org/records/20037847.

</details>


### [252] [Minimax Optimal Variance-Aware Regret Bounds for Multinomial Logistic MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19768)
*Pierre Boudart,Pierre Gaillard,Alessandro Rudi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对多分类逻辑斯蒂（MNL）混合MDP的强化学习问题，提出了一种依赖问题常数 $\bar{\sigma}_T$ 的算法，实现了 $\tilde{O}(dH^2\bar{\sigma}_T\sqrt{T})$ 的遗憾界，在结构化MDP（如KL约束鲁棒MDP）中可将 $H$ 依赖降低一个因子，并构建了匹配的下界，首次完整刻画了MNL混合MDP的遗憾复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MNL混合MDP的算法（Li et al., 2024）仅达到最坏情况下的遗憾界 $\tilde{O}(dH^2\sqrt{T})$，未能利用问题结构（如价值函数的方差特性）来获得更紧的界。受逻辑斯蒂Bandit文献启发，作者希望引入一个反映下游最优价值函数方差的问题依赖常数，以在结构化MDP中实现改进。

Method: 定义了一个问题依赖常数 $\bar{\sigma}_T \leq 1/2$，衡量学习者轨迹上最优下游价值函数的归一化平均方差；提出一种新算法，其遗憾界为 $\tilde{O}(dH^2\bar{\sigma}_T\sqrt{T})$，在最坏情况下恢复现有结果，在结构化MDP中（如KL约束鲁棒MDP，$\bar{\sigma}_T = O(H^{-1})$）显著改进。

Result: 算法达到 $\tilde{O}(dH^2\bar{\sigma}_T\sqrt{T})$ 遗憾上界；在KL约束鲁棒MDP中，$\bar{\sigma}_T = O(H^{-1})$，将水平依赖降低 $H$ 倍；同时建立了 $\Omega(dH^2\bar{\sigma}_T\sqrt{T})$ 的匹配下界。

Conclusion: 该工作首次实现了MNL混合MDP的极小极大最优遗憾界（忽略对数因子），完整刻画了此类问题的遗憾复杂度，并展示了问题依赖常数在结构化环境中带来的实质性改进。

Abstract: We study reinforcement learning for episodic Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) whose transitions are modelled by a multinomial logistic (MNL) model. Existing algorithms for MNL mixture MDPs yield a regret of $\smash{\tilde{O}(dH^2\sqrt{T})}$ (Li et al., 2024), where $d$ is the feature dimension, $H$ the episode length, and $T$ the number of episodes. Inspired by the logistic bandit literature (Abeille et al., 2021; Faury et al., 2022; Boudart et al., 2026), we introduce a problem-dependent constant $\barσ\_T \leq 1/2$, measuring the normalised average variance of the optimal downstream value function along the learner's trajectory. We propose an algorithm achieving a regret of $\smash{\tilde{O}(dH^2\barσ\_T\sqrt{T})}$, which recovers the existing bound in the worst case and improves upon it for structured MDPs. For instance, for KL-constrained robust MDPs, $\barσ\_T = O(H^{-1})$, reducing the horizon dependence by a factor $H$. We further establish a matching $\smash{Ω(dH^2\barσ\_T\sqrt{T})}$ lower bound, proving minimax optimality (up to logarithmic factors) and fully characterising the regret complexity of MNL mixture MDPs for the first time.

</details>


### [253] [Distribution-Free Uncertainty Quantification for Continuous AI Agent Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19779)
*Yuxuan Gao,Megan Wang,Yi Ling Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于分裂共形预测和自适应共形推断的连续AI智能体评估框架，在24小时预测范围内校准误差低于0.02，覆盖率良好，并扩展了多智能体管道的组合不确定性界、成对排名的共形弃权规则以及排行榜级别的FDR校正弃权机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI智能体评估缺乏分布自由的、具有统计保证的连续质量分数预测方法，特别是在多智能体流水线和动态环境（如智能体发布后）的覆盖稳健性方面存在不足。

Method: 采用分裂共形预测和自适应共形推断进行连续评估；开发多智能体管道的组合不确定性界（通过跨阶段相关性rho在[-0.5,0.9]的仿真验证）；提出共形弃权规则控制错误排名率；使用FDR校正进行排行榜级别多重检验。基于18个实时信号（每小时采集）评估50个智能体。

Result: 24小时校准误差低于0.02；智能体发布后间隔自适应扩大35%后收敛；条件覆盖率均值80.4%，90%智能体在[72%,90%]内；跨源情感分歧预测排名不稳定性的相关系数r=0.64 (p<0.01)；循环控制验证显示框架超出基准相关性rho_s=0.52 (p<0.01, n=35)。

Conclusion: 该框架提供了分布自由的覆盖保证，能够自适应捕捉动态变化（如智能体发布），并通过组合不确定性界、弃权规则和FDR校正支持从单智能体到排行榜级别的可靠评估。

Abstract: We adapt split conformal prediction and adaptive conformal inference (ACI) to continuous AI agent evaluation, providing distribution-free coverage guarantees for forecasted quality scores. Conformal intervals achieve calibration error below 0.02 across all nominal levels at the 24h horizon, while ACI correctly widens intervals by 35% following agent releases then reconverges. We further develop compositional uncertainty bounds for multi-agent pipelines (validated via simulation across inter-stage correlations rho in [-0.5, 0.9]), a conformal abstention rule for pairwise rankings with controlled false-ranking rate, and FDR-corrected abstention for leaderboard-scale multiple testing. Evaluating 50 agents via 18 real-time signals collected hourly, we show that per-agent conditional coverage is well-concentrated around the nominal level (mean 80.4%, 90% of agents within [72%, 90%]), and that cross-source sentiment divergence predicts ranking instability (r=0.64, p<0.01). A circularity-controlled validation confirms the framework captures signal beyond benchmarks (rho_s=0.52, p<0.01, n=35). Code and data are released under CC BY 4.0.

</details>


### [254] [From SGD to Muon: Adaptive Optimization via Schatten-p Norms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19781)
*Thomas Massena,Corentin Friedrich,Mathieu Serrurier*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的动态优化器设计方法，通过线性最小化预言（LMO）理论统一了从SGD到Muon的矩阵级更新几何，利用梯度与激活统计量在线选择最优更新几何，在仅增加约3%计算开销的情况下，性能可匹配或超越Muon和AdamW。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有优化器（如Muon）施加固定的矩阵级LMO几何约束，但这些固定几何并非对每个问题、每个网络层都是最优的。作者希望提出一个数据驱动的准则，能够根据每层的梯度与激活统计动态选择最优的更新几何。

Method: 利用单步随机特征回归替代模型，从梯度和激活统计量中推导出闭式准则，动态选择每层的代理最优LMO几何。设计空间从SGD插值到Muon，并引入参数级预条件，使框架可恢复SGD、Muon、Adam和MuAdam。配合高效计算策略，仅增加约3%运行时开销。

Result: 在三种不同训练场景下，该数据驱动优化器的性能匹配或超越了Muon和AdamW中表现最佳的一个。

Conclusion: 证明了LMO几何可以成功且高效地从运行时数据中自适应调整，为超越静态几何的优化器设计开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Modern optimizers, like Muon, impose matrix-wise geometry constraints on their updates. These matrix-wise constraints can be unified under Linear Minimization Oracle (LMO) theory. However, all current methods impose fixed LMO geometries for the update rules, chosen by-design or empirically, which are not necessarily optimal according to the problem's geometry. We introduce a novel efficient datadriven criterion for dynamically choosing proxy-optimal update LMO geometries on individual Deep Neural Network layers. Derived in closed form from gradient and activation statistics using a single-step random feature regression surrogate model, our criterion navigates a design space interpolating from SGD to Muon updates. Moreover, integrating parameter-wise preconditioning allows our framework to recover SGD, Muon, Adam, and MuAdam as specific extrema.
